summary: Verified basketball FGA/FGM stat parsing fix. All 16 tests passed. FGA now correctly combines 2pt + 3pt field goal attempts. Kelly Oubre FGA avg = 10.6 (was 5.9), Paul George FGA avg = 13.1 (was 6.3). DNP filter (< 5 min) working. Recommendation enforcement verified.
critical_code_review_comments: FGA/FGM fix verified in basketball_utils.py lines 239-240: fgm = fg.total + tp.total, fga = fg.attempts + tp.attempts
DNP filter verified in basketball_predict.py lines 507-509: Games with < 5 minutes are skipped with continue
Recommendation enforcement verified in basketball_predict.py line 878: r['recommendation'] = 'over' if pv > req.line else 'under'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified basketball FGA/FGM stat parsing fix. API-Sports basketball API provides field_goals (2pt) and threepoint_goals (3pt) as SEPARATE objects. The fix combines both: fga = field_goals.attempts + threepoint_goals.attempts, fgm = field_goals.total + threepoint_goals.total. Also verified DNP filter (< 5 min games skipped) and recommendation enforcement. Live API tests confirmed: Kelly Oubre FGA avg = 10.6 (was 5.9), Paul George FGA avg = 13.1 (was 6.3).

features_verified.dnp_filter_less_than_5_min: PASS - Games with < 5 minutes filtered out in build_player_game_logs
features_verified.recommendation_enforcement: PASS - Each model's rec forced to match projectedValue vs line
features_verified.handles_empty_dicts: PASS - Returns 0 for empty field_goals/threepoint_goals dicts
